requiredAssets.note: Logo is required for strong brand recognition.
Use official or Google Places food/interior photos before generated imagery.
Menu source is required for factual menu design.
Reservation CTA is optional but valuable when available.

rules: Use real logo as an image asset; do not redraw it as SVG/CSS.
Generated imagery must be marked as generated in evidence.
Do not render sample menu items.
Menu item text must come from menu.sections evidence.

typography.heading: Roboto
typography.body: Humanist sans-serif for mobile menu readability

directions.name: Editorial Menu System
directions.bestFor: Restaurants with rich menus where clarity and trust matter most.
directions.menuTreatment: restaurant sections become the main visual rhythm.

directions.name: Photo-Led Hospitality
directions.philosophy: Field.io motion warmth adapted for food photography
directions.bestFor: Restaurants with strong official or Google Places photos.
directions.menuTreatment: Photos introduce sections, but text remains scannable.

directions.name: Quiet Premium
directions.bestFor: Higher-ticket venues or brands with limited assets that need taste, not noise.
directions.menuTreatment: Menu reads like a refined printed object on mobile.

layoutRules: Mobile-first menu: section tabs, sticky call/map/reserve actions, readable prices.
Desktop menu: two-column rhythm only when item text remains readable.
Address links open Google Maps; phone links use tel:.
Reservation CTA appears only when official provider URL exists.
No nested decorative cards; menu sections are content, not marketing panels.
